TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Rukai, story: RukaiNr-pear_Kainguane

S.FORM: ku naduma yiae.
S.TRANSL: 很久以前…
Long time ago…

S.FORM: iakay kudra drelel ku wamalramalra ku madru ki angatu.
S.TRANSL: 我看到一個人從樹上摘果實
I saw a guy picking fruits from the tree.

S.FORM: kuini madru ki angatu yiae.
S.TRANSL: 那些果實呢...
Those fruits...

S.FORM: drelel aku taliaka nasi.
S.TRANSL: 我看起來像水梨
I think they look like pears

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱單數.附著主格

S.FORM: mia ki navate drelel aku madru yiae.
S.TRANSL: 那些水果，我看起來像番石榴
I think the fruits also look like guavas

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱單數.附著主格

S.FORM: abelenge kudra angatu si laka nasi kudra vasau ludrelel aku.
S.TRANSL: 樹很高，但葉子看起來像水梨的葉子
The tree is tall but the leaves look like leaves of pears.

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱單數.附著主格

S.FORM: sae malramalra kuini tatama ikay belengane si la ikay kudra pucakena ini ku pua ki kalradrare ku aku drusa nga kudra malra ini taiya.
S.TRANSL: 那個在上面的男人拿(梨子)並且放進在地面上的籃子裡，而且他已 經裝滿兩籃(梨子)
The man who is above takes (pears), puts (them) in the baskets on the ground, and he has filled two baskets.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格
第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: la ikay kudra walripate ku wapilipilipili ku kiyu ku tatama.
S.TRANSL: 有一個經過並且拉著羊的男人
There is a man who is passing through and pulling a goat.

S.FORM: taingane kudra yiae.
S.TRANSL: 另外那個呢...
Besides,

S.FORM: la ikay kudra vavalake kudra mualrikilrikili.
S.TRANSL: 有一個騎著腳踏車的小孩
There is a child who is riding a bicycle.

S.FORM: kuini mualrikilrikili yiae.
S.TRANSL: 那個騎腳踏車的呢…
The one who is riding a bicycle…

S.FORM: la malra kuini vavalake kuini wadrele pasuabelenge sa kai dredredrele kuini tatama yiae.
S.TRANSL: 當那男人沒有看(的時候)，那個往上看的小孩拿了(梨子)
the child who is looking up takes (pears) when the man is not looking.

S.FORM: la malra kudra iakay kudra ki karadrare si la pua kudra ki lrikili ini pubelenge si katuase.
S.TRANSL: (他)拿了籃子、放在腳踏車上面，然後離開
(He) takes the basket, puts it on his bicycle, and leaves.

S.FORM: la madredresenge kudra ki tangea ku apapai ku maiali mulrilrilrikili.
S.TRANSL: (他)遇到一個也騎腳踏車的女孩
(He) meets a girl who also rides a bicycle.

S.FORM: matanapisi mutalrubunane kui lasu.
S.TRANSL: 那個戴帽子的男孩就撞到了
the boy whose hat fell collide

S.FORM: sa mutalrubunu kui lasu la pasulikudru na la kilrimu drele kuini ki alisu.
S.TRANSL: 當男孩的帽子掉的時候，他還是往後看那個女孩
when the boy’s hat fell, he kept looking back at the girl

S.FORM: takukatuatuase la kilrimu pasualikudru drele.
S.TRANSL: (當男孩)離開時，(他)仍然往後看那個女孩
(when the boy is) leaving, (he) kept looking back at the girl.

S.FORM: muabungubungu kuini ki lrenege.
S.TRANSL: (那男孩)撞上了石頭
(he) collided with the stone

S.FORM: sa mubungubungu kuini ki lrenege muadreke.
S.TRANSL: 當(男孩)撞上石頭的時候，(他)跌倒了
when (the boy) collided with the stone, (he) fell down.

S.FORM: kuini sa mugugu nga yae.
S.TRANSL: 當(梨子)灑出來的時候,
when (the pears) have spread,

S.FORM: la ikay kuini suasuasulape kuini drapale ini miakitali ku lalenge.
S.TRANSL: 他的腳上有一個傷口-當他在摸的時候
there is a wound on his leg, which he is touching

S.FORM: wakelakela kudra tatulru kudra lamalala.
S.TRANSL: 那三個男生正過來
the three boys are coming.

S.FORM: si takuucenge pingpung kuini nikelengeane kuini ki tapungupungupunguane la dreele kuini ki lasu.
S.TRANSL: 那男孩正拿著球綁在上面的兵乓球拍，並且看著那個男孩
the boy is holding the ping-pong onto which the ball is tied and looking at that boy

S.FORM: ani ikay kuini muadreke kuini lasu.
S.TRANSL: 為什麼那邊有位男孩跌倒了?
why is there a boy falling down?

S.FORM: la kilrimu palralupu kuini lamalala.
S.TRANSL: 那些男孩即刻幫忙
these boys are helping instantly

S.FORM: kay lamalala yae.
S.TRANSL: 這些男孩呢…
these boys…

S.FORM: la palralupu drakale si la palralupu visivisi iniane ku suvugu.
S.TRANSL: (他們)幫忙扶(那男孩)並且幫忙拍掉灰塵
(they) help support (that boy) and help flap the dust away

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.自由斜格

S.FORM: la palralupu iniane pubelenge kuini nasi ala katuase kuini lamalala.
S.TRANSL: (他們)幫他把梨子放上(腳踏車)，然後這些男孩就走了
(they) help him put pears on (the bicycle), and then these boys leave

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.自由斜格

S.FORM: ai sa palralualupu iakay kudra tangea ku lasu kudra kai palralualupu wathethethengete kuini pingpungu ini taia.
S.TRANSL: 但是，當(他們)在幫(他)的時候，有一個男生沒有幫忙，(而且)忙著玩他的乒乓
but, when (they) help (him), there is a boy who does not help, (and) is busy playing his ping-pong

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: amani kuini tadrusa kiasamula palralupu.
S.TRANSL: (就只有)兩個(男孩)熱心地幫忙(他)
(only) the two (boys) help (him) enthusiastically

S.FORM: samaka pubelenge la si katuase masauvavagai.
S.TRANSL: 當(他們把梨子)放上(腳踏車)之後，(他們)就離開，(和男孩)分開
after (they) put (the pears) on (the bicycle), (they) leave and separate (with the boy)

S.FORM: la katuase kuini tatulru lamalala.
S.TRANSL: 當這三個男孩離開的時候
when these three boys leave

S.FORM: sa katuase yae.
S.TRANSL: 當(他們)離開的時候呢…
when (they) leave…

S.FORM: takai kipakane ki lasu kuini tapalralupane ta malra kuini paugugu ini.
S.TRANSL: 為什麼我們沒有被我們幫他撿起(梨子)的那個男孩所招待?
why are we not treated by the boy we help pick up (the pears) he spreads?

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱複數(包含).附著主格
第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: la siulili kuini tangea.
S.TRANSL: 一個(男孩)走回去
one (boy) goes back,

S.FORM: si la mua le.
S.TRANSL: 一個(男孩)走去
one (boy) goes,

S.FORM: ala kakurua nayane si baai nayane sakavaevaevaeva kuini nasi amani kuini taparalubuane nay musuane.
S.TRANSL: 然後，(請)可憐我們並且給我們一人一個梨子因為我們給你的幫助
then, (please) commiserate us and give each one of us a pear because of our help for you

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱複數(排除).自由斜格
第一人稱複數(排除).自由斜格
第一人稱複數(排除).附著屬格
第二人稱單數.自由斜格

S.FORM: la bai kuini lasu mutulru.
S.TRANSL: 那男孩給了三個(梨子)
the boy gives three (pears)

S.FORM: ala katuase kuini lasu si katuase iluku.
S.TRANSL: 然後，男孩就走了，帶著(梨子)離開
then, the boy leaves and carry (the pears) away

S.FORM: madru ki angatu kay palalrubu ngai musuane laiye.
S.TRANSL: 請你幫忙吃，他說。
please help eat the fruits, the boy says.

M.TRANSL: 第二人稱單數.自由斜格

S.FORM: la baai kudra lasu pakatulra la katuase.
S.TRANSL: 那男孩給了他的朋友三顆 然後就離開
The (the boy) gave three (pears) to his friends and then let.

S.FORM: la takukanekane malalala katatalranane si.
S.TRANSL: 他們一面吃一面走
Then they are eating the pears while walking on the road.

S.FORM: sa olrepe nga la drele kuidra ki malra ini.
S.TRANSL: 當他下來 看見他所採的水果的時候
When (the man) comes down and sees the fruits he picked down.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: kai muagogo si.
S.TRANSL: 籃子沒倒出來
(The basket) is not turned over.

S.FORM: wakelakela kudra tadolo.
S.TRANSL: 那三個人正在來
There came three people.

S.FORM: amanigo ita palralubu ki vavalake.
S.TRANSL: 就是那些幫忙那個小孩的人
(they) are those who helped the child.

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱複數(包含).附著屬格

S.FORM: la drele kuni lasu.
S.TRANSL: 然後(這個男子)看見他們
Then (the man) saw the three people.

S.FORM: ikamanili nga kay lamalalala ka wamalra kay nasi.
S.TRANSL: (那男人) 懷疑那三個男孩拿了梨子
(the man) suspects that the three boys took the pears.

S.FORM: ai lru drele kalrua ku lamanemane ini.
S.TRANSL: 但是他看見的時候, 沒有他的東西
But when (the man) sees (them), there are no things(his things).

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: la pangu kavalingivingi kay lasu kuini ki lamalalala sa katuatuase ngilribate.
S.TRANSL: 然後，那三個人經過時，(那男人)懷疑那三個人。
Then, when the three boys are leaving and passing by, (the man) suspects (them).

S.FORM: la muinu kuini nasi.
S.TRANSL: 那些梨子去哪裏?
Where does the pears go?

S.FORM: akakia malramalra kuini polrupunai ini kuini ki vavalake.
S.TRANSL: 原來是小孩拿走他採的(梨子)
It turns out that the child took his pears.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: langimia kuini kay yakao masani.
S.TRANSL: 世界上的人就是這樣子
Humans in the world are like so.

S.FORM: icucubungu ki umaumase sana patuatuma kwaubauba.
S.TRANSL: 在人的面前只要人不注意，就會偷
Even when they are in fron of others, they still steal when other people are careless.

S.FORM: ngimiyamiya kuini kotaka umaumase.
S.TRANSL: 我們人就是這樣
Humans appears to be so.

S.FORM: lao amani ikay amiyata votha cabang.
S.TRANSL: 是不是這個? (那男人)亂猜
Are they the guys (who steal the pears)? (The man) takes a wild guess.

S.FORM: drela kuini wadrele kuini ki tatolo si.
S.TRANSL: 看到那三個人的時候
When (the man) sees the three boys

S.FORM: kai wathingale amani numi iya.
S.TRANSL: 不知道卻說就是你們
(The man) does not know but say that it is you guys (who did it).

M.TRANSL: 第二人稱複數.附著主格

S.FORM: kadrua ku takaiyane ini.
S.TRANSL: 他沒有容器
They do not have any containers.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: kay asasane kay ngilisianane.
S.TRANSL: 現代不良的環境
It is bad nowadays.

S.FORM: Miyamiya kay apolokai.
S.TRANSL: 這個故事像這樣
The story is so.
